summary: Full E2E testing of WAR ROOM app. All core features working: setup screen, profile persistence, WarRoom navigation, AI briefings, mission counter, locked overlay, mobile panel toggle.

issues: AI response renders raw markdown (##, **bold**) as plain text instead of formatted HTML. Consider using a markdown renderer like react-markdown.
Left profile panel not visually distinct in screenshot - renders correctly (visible=true) but appears flush with main content. Minor CSS layout note.

action_items: Consider adding react-markdown to render AI responses with proper markdown formatting (##, **bold**, lists) instead of raw text
critical_code_review_comments: AI response not rendering markdown - displays raw ## and ** characters. Low priority UX improvement.
Mission counter bottom bar value (0/3) text appears very small/cut off in desktop screenshot bottom bar - minor layout concern.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows verified working: setup→warroom navigation, profile in localStorage, AI briefings via /api/brief, mission counter decrement (3/3→2/3 after request), locked overlay at 0/3 with UPGRADE button, mobile panel toggle, edit profile. Only minor issue: AI response renders raw markdown characters.
test_credentials: None required - app uses localStorage only, no auth
